title: Major Bank Files 8-K Disclosing Cybersecurity Breach Affecting 3.2M Customers
content: A top-10 US bank filed an 8-K disclosing a cybersecurity incident compromising 3.2 million customer records. Remediation costs estimated at $150–200M. Regulatory investigations pending.

title: Energy Conglomerate 10-Q Reveals $2.8B Goodwill Impairment
content: An energy company's 10-Q reveals $2.8B goodwill impairment from failed renewable energy acquisition. Total assets reduced by 8%. Company in discussions with lenders regarding covenant modifications.

title: Pharmaceutical Company Annual Filing Shows Routine Compliance Update
content: A mid-cap pharmaceutical company's annual 10-K filing shows stable revenue growth of 4% year-over-year with no material weaknesses identified. Internal controls rated effective by external auditors. No significant risk factors added.
